title: Xtal
meaning_summary: This recording leans on atmosphere, texture, and replayable mood, which makes it durable in listener memory and long-tail streaming.
revenue_drivers: Playlist and mood-based streaming support repeat listening over long periods.
Steady niche demand and reissue interest can keep the track earning.
Licensing and soundtrack-style use can materially improve the long tail.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: Xtal is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
